description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs tests on every push to master, develop, and tags, and on pull requests. The tests run on multiple operating systems (Ubuntu 22.04, Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 13, macOS 15) with various compilers (clang++), C++ standards, Python versions, and CastXML EPIC versions. After successful tests, build a Python distribution on Ubuntu and publish it to PyPI and GitHub Releases on tag pushes.
